title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a Docker-like UX.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client and asyncio bindings for the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat).

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example showing how to scale Ollama models across a cluster.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat wrapper with history, syntax highlighting and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into the GitHub Copilot sidebar.

title: ollama-kubectl-plugin
summary: Kubectl plugin to deploy and manage Ollama on Kubernetes clusters via Helm.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All chat UI fork that can connect to a local Ollama server instead of bundled models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-rag-stack
summary: Starter template for building private RAG apps with Ollama, Chroma and Streamlit.

title: ollama-node
summary: Zero-dependency Node.js client for Ollama with first-class TypeScript types.

title: ollama-py on PyPI
summary: Official PyPI package for the Ollama Python client (mirror of GitHub repo).

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Android client library for Ollama with reactive (RxJava) wrappers.

title: ollama-curl examples
summary: Collection of curl snippets demonstrating every Ollama REST endpoint.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Community-curated list of custom Modelfiles and quantized GGUFs ready for Ollama.
